justification: The diff correctly upgrades Java version to 21 in both CI and pom.xml, switches to <release> instead of <source>/<target>, and migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 and javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence. However, it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., virtual threads, pattern matching, records), so idiomatic_java21 is 4 instead of 5. The migration is clean and coherent with no spurious changes.
